::: {.content-visible when-format="pdf"}
```{=latex}
    \bigskip
    \begin{notebox}
    \textbf{Land Acknowledgement:} Carleton derives wealth and prestige through its ownership of ancestral homelands of the Wahpekute and Mdewakanton bands of the Dakota Nation and more broadly as an academic institution in the United States. I urge you to support the organizing work of Indigenous peoples seeking liberation through direct action, advocacy, and education.
    \end{notebox}
```
:::

:::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
::: {.callout-important}
### Land Acknowledgement
Carleton derives wealth and prestige through its ownership of ancestral homelands of the Wahpekute and Mdewakanton bands of the Dakota Nation and more broadly as an academic institution in the United States. I urge you to support the organizing work of Indigenous peoples seeking liberation through direct action, advocacy, and education.
:::
::::
